problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics may resolve Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
